## WP 2 — Per-backend context-menu files (5 stub files + dispatcher function)

| File | Lines | Contents | Safe to delete |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crates/core/src/ui/account/demo/context_menu.rs` | 32 | `ServerContextMenuExtras` adds a "Regenerate Demo Data" item. | Yes — after WP 2 plugin declaration ships |
| `crates/core/src/ui/account/stoat/context_menu.rs` | 21 | `ServerContextMenuExtras` for Stoat; empty comment body. | Yes |
| `crates/core/src/ui/account/discord/context_menu.rs` | 21 | `ServerContextMenuExtras` for Discord; empty comment body. | Yes |
| `crates/core/src/ui/account/matrix/context_menu.rs` | 22 | `ServerContextMenuExtras` for Matrix; empty comment body. | Yes |
| `crates/core/src/ui/account/poly_native/context_menu.rs` | 21 | `ServerContextMenuExtras` for Poly native; empty comment body. | Yes |
| `crates/core/src/ui/account/teams/context_menu.rs` | 21 | `ServerContextMenuExtras` for Teams; empty comment body. | Yes |

**Dispatcher function** (function deletion within a file):
- `crates/core/src/ui/account/mod.rs` lines 119–201 — `backend_server_context_menu_extras()`. The file stays (re-exports, mod decls); function body + `match bt.as_str()` block (lines 129–201) are removed. File shrinks from 201 → ~113 lines.

The call site in `crates/core/src/ui/account/server/context_menu.rs` line 314 is replaced by the `ClientMenu` wire-up in WP 2. `server/context_menu.rs` (415 lines) is **not** deleted — it becomes the host-universal menu component.

## WP 3 — Per-backend Rust settings files

### Slug-match predicates to delete (file stays)

| File | Lines | What gets deleted | Safe to delete |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crates/core/src/ui/account/server/settings/overview.rs` | 391 | `supports_banner()` + `is_local_only()` slug predicates (lines 34–42). Rest of icon/banner UI stays as generic. | No — file stays; delete just the two predicates. |

### Generic settings that stay

- `crates/core/src/ui/account/server/settings/notifications.rs` (168 L) — no slug matches; content may shrink as plugin-declared settings absorb Discord-specific rows.
- `crates/core/src/ui/account/server/settings/profile.rs` (84 L) — nickname input; merges into plugin section after WP 3.
- `crates/core/src/ui/account/server/settings/general.rs` (165 L) — leave-server universal flow; stays.
- `crates/core/src/ui/account/server/settings/mod.rs` (445 L) — tabs/scroll-spy; gains plugin injection in WP 3.

### Backend-specific subdirectory audit

Checked `crates/core/src/ui/account/{discord,stoat,matrix,teams,demo,poly_native}/`. Each contains only `mod.rs` and `context_menu.rs`. **No per-backend settings Rust files exist.** WP 3 only removes slug predicates.

## WIT deletions (handled in WP 1 — inventory only here)

- `wit/messenger-plugin.wit` lines 17–23 — `enum backend-type { stoat, matrix, discord, teams, demo, poly }`. Replaced by `string` (slug) per D17. Used in 9 record field declarations throughout the file; all migrate to `string`.
- `wit/messenger-plugin.wit` line 715 — `get-backend-type: func() -> backend-type`. Return type changes to `string`.
- `wit/messenger-plugin.wit` lines 757–820 — `interface plugin-metadata` loses `get-settings-schema` (D18). Other functions stay.
- `clients/demo/src/guest.rs` lines 36–45 — `to_wit_backend_type()` bridge. Deleted when WIT enum removed.
